# FreshLien

> Same-day distressed property data for real estate investors and B2B teams.

FreshLien pulls county and court public records into one searchable platform. Search 100K+ foreclosure filings across 250+ counties in 40+ states with same-day updates on priority markets.

## Product

- Web app (map search, filters, property detail): https://freshlien.com/dashboard/foreclosures
- Pricing: https://freshlien.com/pricing
- REST API docs: https://freshlien.com/api
- Free signup: https://freshlien.com/register

- Blog index: https://freshlien.com/blog

- How to find foreclosure deals before auction: https://freshlien.com/blog/how-to-find-foreclosure-deals-before-auction
- What is foreclosure: https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-foreclosure-complete-guide
- What is pre-foreclosure: https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-pre-foreclosure
- What is a distressed property: https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-a-distressed-property
- Sheriff sale vs trustee sale: https://freshlien.com/blog/sheriff-sale-vs-trustee-sale
- Notice of Trustee Sale (NTS): https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-notice-of-trustee-sale
- How foreclosure auctions work: https://freshlien.com/blog/how-foreclosure-auctions-work
- What is REO: https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-reo-real-estate-owned
- Foreclosure leads vs county records: https://freshlien.com/blog/foreclosure-leads-vs-county-records
- How to analyze a foreclosure deal: https://freshlien.com/blog/how-to-analyze-a-foreclosure-deal

- Tax delinquent properties: https://freshlien.com/blog/tax-delinquent-properties-for-investors
- What is lis pendens: https://freshlien.com/blog/what-is-lis-pendens
